overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character moves from an open plaza with classical architecture into a narrow ascending walled corridor illuminated by fire braziers, showcasing Greco-Roman stone architecture against a deep blue night sky.

events.description: pedestrian passes by on the left, temporarily blocking view of the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the large domed temple ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in robes walking past the character on the left side

entered.detail: large classical building with domed roof and columns, illuminated against the night sky
burning fire bowls on stone pedestals providing warm orange light
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza
ancient stone buildings with columns and detailed facades
wide stone-tiled plaza ground with weathered textures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide open plaza at night, with the character walking toward a prominent domed temple in the distance. Fire braziers burn on the left, casting warm light against the cool blue night, while a pedestrian passes by on the left. Classical stone buildings and palm trees frame the open space.

events.description: moving from open plaza into a more enclosed street lined with statues and buildings
approaching the entrance to a narrow walled corridor with ascending steps

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stone street, passing classical statues and approaching a walled passage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction up the street

entered.detail: classical stone statues on pedestals depicting figures in togas
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the right side of the street
low stone walls with planted vegetation on top
vertical red fabric banners hanging above the street entrance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a medium-width street lined with marble statues and cypress trees. The domed temple recedes behind as the character approaches a walled corridor entrance marked by red banners. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, and the fire braziers shift to the right side of the path.

events.description: entering the narrow walled corridor with high stone walls on both sides
continuing steady ascent up the stone steps, walls becoming closer

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps through the narrow passage between high walls

entered.detail: tall white stone walls enclosing the left side of the path, covered in vines
tall white stone walls with vegetation growing on the surfaces
ascending stone staircase with worn treads
fire lights mounted on the walls providing illumination in the narrow space

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor with high stone walls on both sides, ascending a series of stone steps. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the walls, creating a sheltered passageway illuminated by wall-mounted fire sconces. Red banners hang overhead, and the vegetation-covered walls create an intimate, ascending pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open city plaza into a narrow, ascending stone corridor under a deep blue night sky. It begins in an expansive square where the character walks toward a distant domed temple, flanked by burning fire braziers and classical stone buildings. As the character moves forward, the open space shifts into a medium-width street lined with marble statues and cypress trees, with the temple receding as the path leads toward a walled entrance marked by red banners. The scene then tightens as the character enters a narrow enclosed passageway, where the open sky is replaced by high stone walls and wall-mounted fire sconces. Finally, the camera follows the character up a series of stone steps through this intimate, vegetation-covered corridor.
